account-retention.warning.subject: [%1] Your account will be deleted in %2 days
account-retention.warning.intro: You have an account on %1, but you have not logged in for %2 days.
account-retention.warning.action: Per our privacy policy, inactive accounts are automatically deleted. If you do nothing, your account will be removed in %1 days.
account-retention.warning.alt: To keep your account, click the button above or simply log in to %1.
account-retention.final-warning.subject: [%1] FINAL NOTICE — account deletion in %2 days
account-retention.final-warning.intro: This is the last reminder from %1 — your account will be deleted in %2 days.
account-retention.final-warning.body: Your account has been inactive for %1 days. Once deleted, we will not be able to restore it.
account-retention.final-warning.alt: Click the button above or log in to %1 to keep your account.
account-retention.deleted.subject: [%1] Your account has been deleted
account-retention.deleted.intro: Your account on %1 has been deleted due to inactivity (last active %2 days ago).
account-retention.deleted.body: Your posts remain in the forum archive but are no longer linked to your profile. You are welcome to create a new account at any time.
account-retention.footer.legal: You are receiving this message because you have an account on our forum. It is sent automatically as part of our data retention policy.
